---
name: GitHub repository reference
description: Repo URL and naming history

---

GitHub repo current name: **agent-orchestrator** (renamed from **derpr-python**).

Remote URL: https://github.com/Addrick/agent-orchestrator.git

Renamed by Adam on GitHub. (Earlier docs noted an intermediate `llm-orchestrator` name, discovered 2026-03-17; current remote is `agent-orchestrator`. GitHub auto-redirects the old URLs.) GHCR package likewise renamed `derpr-python` → `orchestratr` (DP-259, 2026-06-29).
